data.description: Find parcel info and survey maps by LR No, parcel number, or location across Kenya.

    <style>
        /* ===========================================================
           DESIGN TOKENS — shared family identity
           =========================================================== */
        :root {
            --bg-base: #f4f1ea;
            --bg-elevated: #ffffff;
            --bg-panel: #ebe6db;
            --bg-inset: #e0dac9;
            --border-subtle: #d4cdbb;
            --border-strong: #1a1a1a;
            --text-primary: #1a1a1a;
            --text-secondary: #5c574c;
            --text-muted: #8a8472;
            --accent: #c2410c;
            --accent-soft: #fed7aa;
            --accent-2: #166534;
            --danger: #b91c1c;
            --grid-line: rgba(26, 26, 26, 0.06);
            --shadow-sm: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.04);
            --shadow-md: 0 4px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.08);
            --shadow-lg: 0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.12);

            /* Data-source colors — distinct in both themes */
            --src-nairobi: #c2410c;   /* same as accent (primary region) */
            --src-mombasa: #0e7490;   /* teal — distinct from accent */
        }
        [data-theme="dark"] {
            --bg-base: #0e1116;
            --bg-elevated: #161b22;
            --bg-panel: #1c2129;
            --bg-inset: #0a0d12;
            --border-subtle: #2a3038;
            --border-strong: #e6e1d6;
            --text-primary: #e6e1d6;
            --text-secondary: #a8a293;
            --text-muted: #6b6757;
            --accent: #fb923c;
            --accent-soft: #422006;
            --accent-2: #4ade80;
            --danger: #f87171;
            --grid-line: rgba(230, 225, 214, 0.05);
            --shadow-sm: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.3);
            --shadow-md: 0 4px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.4);
            --shadow-lg: 0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.5);

            --src-nairobi: #fb923c;
            --src-mombasa: #22d3ee;
        }

        * { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }

        html, body {
            height: 100%;
            overflow: hidden;
            background: var(--bg-base);
            color: var(--text-primary);
            font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', sans-serif;
            font-weight: 400;
            line-height: 1.5;
            -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
            transition: background 0.2s ease, color 0.2s ease;
        }

        /* ===========================================================
           APP SHELL
           =========================================================== */
        .app {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            height: 100vh;
        }

        /* ---- Topbar ---- */
        .topbar {
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
            background: var(--bg-elevated);
            z-index: 1000;
            flex-shrink: 0;
        }
        .topbar-inner {
            padding: 12px 20px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: space-between;
            gap: 20px;
        }
        .brand {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            text-decoration: none;
            color: var(--text-primary);
        }
        .brand-logo {
            display: block;
            height: 36px;
            width: auto;
            max-width: 220px;
            object-fit: contain;
            transition: opacity 0.15s ease;
        }
        .brand:hover .brand-logo { opacity: 0.8; }
        [data-theme="dark"] .brand-logo {
            background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.92);
            padding: 4px 10px;
            border-radius: 2px;
        }
        .topbar-actions { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; }
        .icon-btn {
            width: 36px;
            height: 36px;
            border: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
            background: var(--bg-elevated);
            color: var(--text-primary);
            cursor: pointer;
            display: grid;
            place-items: center;
            transition: all 0.15s ease;
        }
        .icon-btn:hover { border-color: var(--border-strong); background: var(--bg-panel); }
        .ext-link {
            font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
            font-size: 11px;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.08em;
            color: var(--text-secondary);
            text-decoration: none;
            padding: 8px 12px;
            border: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
            transition: all 0.15s ease;
            display: inline-flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 8px;
            height: 36px;
        }
        .ext-link:hover { border-color: var(--border-strong); color: var(--text-primary); }

        /* ---- Main split: sidebar + map ---- */
        .content {
            display: flex;
            flex: 1;
            min-height: 0;
            overflow: hidden;
        }

        .sidebar {
            width: 380px;
            flex-shrink: 0;
            background: var(--bg-elevated);
            border-right: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            overflow: hidden;
        }

        /* Sidebar header — title + coverage note */
        .side-head {
            padding: 16px 20px 14px;
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
            background: var(--bg-elevated);
        }
        .side-head .label {
            font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
            font-size: 10px;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.14em;
            color: var(--text-muted);
            display: inline-flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 10px;
            margin-bottom: 8px;
        }
        .side-head .label::before {
            content: '';
            display: inline-block;
            width: 18px;
            height: 1px;
            background: var(--accent);
        }
        .side-head h1 {
            font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', sans-serif;
            font-weight: 500;
            font-size: 17px;
            line-height: 1.2;
            letter-spacing: -0.01em;
            margin-bottom: 6px;
        }
        .side-head .sub {
            font-size: 12px;
            color: var(--text-secondary);
            line-height: 1.45;
        }
        .coverage-pill {
            display: inline-flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 6px;
            margin-top: 10px;
            padding: 4px 8px;
            background: var(--bg-base);
            border: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
            font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
            font-size: 10px;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.08em;
            color: var(--text-secondary);
        }
        .coverage-pill .dot {
            width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%;
            background: var(--accent-2);
            box-shadow: 0 0 6px var(--accent-2);
        }

        /* Sidebar body — scrollable */
        .side-body {
            flex: 1;
            overflow-y: auto;
            padding: 18px 20px 24px;
        }

        /* ===========================================================
           FORM CONTROLS
           =========================================================== */
        .field-label {
            display: block;
            font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
            font-size: 10px;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.1em;
            color: var(--text-muted);
            margin-bottom: 6px;
        }

        /* Segmented tabs — replaces the queryType dropdown */
        .segmented {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
            background: var(--bg-base);
            border: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
            margin-bottom: 18px;
            padding: 3px;
            gap: 2px;
        }
        .seg-btn {
            background: transparent;
            border: none;
            font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
            font-size: 10px;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.08em;
            color: var(--text-secondary);
            padding: 8px 6px;
            cursor: pointer;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 4px;
            transition: all 0.15s ease;
        }
        .seg-btn i { font-size: 13px; color: var(--text-muted); }
        .seg-btn:hover { color: var(--text-primary); }
        .seg-btn:hover i { color: var(--accent); }
        .seg-btn.is-active {
            background: var(--bg-elevated);
            color: var(--text-primary);
            box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm);
        }
        .seg-btn.is-active i { color: var(--accent); }

        /* Hidden mode panels */
        .mode-panel { display: none; }
        .mode-panel.is-active { display: block; }

        .field-group { margin-bottom: 14px; }

        .field-input {
            width: 100%;
            height: 38px;
            padding: 0 12px;
            background: var(--bg-base);
            border: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
            color: var(--text-primary);
            font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
            font-size: 13px;
            transition: border-color 0.15s ease;
            outline: none;
        }
        .field-input:focus {
            border-color: var(--accent);
            box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(251, 146, 60, 0.15);
        }
        .field-input::placeholder { color: var(--text-muted); }
        .field-input::-webkit-outer-spin-button,
        .field-input::-webkit-inner-spin-button { -webkit-appearance: none; margin: 0; }

        .field-row {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
            gap: 10px;
        }

        .field-hint {
            font-size: 11px;
            color: var(--text-muted);
            margin-top: 4px;
            font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
        }

        /* Buttons */
        .actions {
            display: flex;
            gap: 8px;
            margin-top: 6px;
        }
        .btn {
            display: inline-flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            gap: 8px;
            height: 38px;
            padding: 0 16px;
            border: 1px solid;
            background: none;
            font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
            font-size: 11px;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.1em;
            font-weight: 500;
            cursor: pointer;
            text-decoration: none;
            transition: all 0.15s ease;
        }
        .btn:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }
        .btn-primary {
            background: var(--accent);
            border-color: var(--accent);
            color: #fff;
            flex: 1;
        }
        .btn-primary:hover:not(:disabled) {
            filter: brightness(1.08);
            box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px var(--accent-soft);
        }
        .btn-secondary {
            background: var(--bg-elevated);
            border-color: var(--border-subtle);
            color: var(--text-primary);
        }
        .btn-secondary:hover:not(:disabled) {
            border-color: var(--border-strong);
            color: var(--accent);
        }
        .btn-block { width: 100%; }

        /* Location status line */
        .loc-status {
            margin-top: 10px;
            padding: 8px 10px;
            font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
            font-size: 11px;
            color: var(--text-secondary);
            background: var(--bg-base);
            border: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
            display: none;
        }
        .loc-status.is-visible { display: block; }
        .loc-status.is-error { color: var(--danger); border-color: var(--danger); }
        .loc-status .coords { color: var(--text-primary); }

        /* ===========================================================
           RESULTS PANEL (inside sidebar)
           =========================================================== */
        .results-wrap {
            margin-top: 18px;
            padding-top: 18px;
            border-top: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
        }
        .results-empty {
            text-align: center;
            padding: 30px 10px;
            color: var(--text-muted);
        }
        .results-empty i {
            font-size: 22px;
            opacity: 0.5;
            margin-bottom: 8px;
            display: block;
        }
        .results-empty p {
            font-size: 12px;
            line-height: 1.5;
            max-width: 240px;
            margin: 0 auto;
        }

        .results-loading {
            text-align: center;
            padding: 30px 10px;
            color: var(--text-muted);
            font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
            font-size: 11px;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.1em;
        }
        .results-loading .spinner {
            display: inline-block;
            width: 14px; height: 14px;
            border: 2px solid var(--border-subtle);
            border-top-color: var(--accent);
            border-radius: 50%;
            animation: spin 0.8s linear infinite;
            margin-right: 8px;
            vertical-align: middle;
        }
        @keyframes spin { to { transform: rotate(360deg); } }

        .results-head {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: space-between;
            margin-bottom: 12px;
        }
        .results-head .label {
            font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
            font-size: 10px;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.14em;
            color: var(--text-muted);
            display: inline-flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 10px;
        }
        .results-head .label::before {
            content: '';
            display: inline-block;
            width: 14px;
            height: 1px;
            background: var(--accent);
        }
        .src-pill {
            font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
            font-size: 9px;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.1em;
            padding: 2px 7px;
            border: 1px solid;
            font-weight: 500;
        }
        .src-pill.nairobi { color: var(--src-nairobi); border-color: var(--src-nairobi); }
        .src-pill.mombasa { color: var(--src-mombasa); border-color: var(--src-mombasa); }

        /*
           The server returns Bootstrap tables. Override generically so they
           fit the aesthetic without changing the PHP.
        */
        #results table {
            width: 100%;
            border-collapse: collapse;
            font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
            font-size: 11px;
            margin-bottom: 12px;
        }
        #results th, #results td {
            padding: 7px 10px;
            border: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
            text-align: left;
            vertical-align: top;
            background: var(--bg-base);
            color: var(--text-primary);
        }
        #results th {
            font-size: 9px;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.08em;
            color: var(--text-muted);
            font-weight: 500;
            background: var(--bg-panel);
            width: 38%;
        }
        #results .table-primary th,
        #results th.table-primary {
            background: var(--bg-panel) !important;
            color: var(--src-nairobi) !important;
        }
        #results .table-info th,
        #results th.table-info {
            background: var(--bg-panel) !important;
            color: var(--src-mombasa) !important;
        }
        #results td {
            font-weight: 500;
            word-break: break-word;
        }
        #results p {
            font-size: 12px;
            color: var(--text-secondary);
            padding: 12px;
            background: var(--bg-base);
            border-left: 3px solid var(--danger);
        }
        #results h4, #results h5, #results h6 {
            font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
            font-size: 10px;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.1em;
            color: var(--text-muted);
            font-weight: 500;
            margin: 12px 0 6px;
        }
        #results .nairobi-data { color: var(--src-nairobi); }
        #results .mombasa-data { color: var(--src-mombasa); }

        /* ===========================================================
           MAP CONTAINER (right side, dominant)
           =========================================================== */
        .map-wrap {
            flex: 1;
            position: relative;
            background: var(--bg-inset);
            min-width: 0;
        }
        #map {
            height: 100%;
            width: 100%;
            background: var(--bg-inset);
        }
        /* Floating crosshair overlay (subtle, decorative) */
        .map-wrap::before, .map-wrap::after {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            pointer-events: none;
            z-index: 401;
            opacity: 0.25;
        }

        /* Map overlay header (status strip) */
        .map-overlay {
            position: absolute;
            top: 12px;
            left: 12px;
            z-index: 600;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 10px;
            padding: 7px 12px;
            background: var(--bg-elevated);
            border: 1px solid var(--border-strong);
            box-shadow: var(--shadow-md);
            font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
            font-size: 10px;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.1em;
            color: var(--text-secondary);
        }
        .map-overlay .dot {
            width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%;
            background: var(--accent-2);
            box-shadow: 0 0 8px var(--accent-2);
            animation: pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite;
        }
        @keyframes pulse { 0%,100%{opacity:1} 50%{opacity:0.4} }
        .map-overlay .sep {
            width: 1px; height: 12px; background: var(--border-subtle);
        }
        .map-overlay .base { color: var(--text-primary); }

        /* ===========================================================
           LEAFLET — themed controls
           =========================================================== */
        .leaflet-bar,
        .leaflet-control-layers {
            background: var(--bg-elevated) !important;
            border: 1px solid var(--border-strong) !important;
            border-radius: 0 !important;
            box-shadow: var(--shadow-md) !important;
            overflow: hidden;
        }
        .leaflet-bar a {
            background: var(--bg-elevated) !important;
            color: var(--text-primary) !important;
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-subtle) !important;
            font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace !important;
        }
        .leaflet-bar a:hover {
            background: var(--bg-panel) !important;
            color: var(--accent) !important;
        }
        .leaflet-control-layers-expanded {
            background: var(--bg-elevated) !important;
            color: var(--text-primary) !important;
            font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', sans-serif !important;
            font-size: 12px !important;
            padding: 12px 14px !important;
            min-width: 120px;
        }
        .leaflet-control-layers label {
            display: flex !important;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 8px;
            margin: 4px 0 !important;
        }
        .leaflet-control-layers-selector { accent-color: var(--accent); }
        .leaflet-control-attribution {
            background: rgba(255,255,255,0.85) !important;
            border: none !important;
            font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', sans-serif !important;
            font-size: 10px !important;
        }
        [data-theme="dark"] .leaflet-control-attribution {
            background: rgba(14,17,22,0.7) !important;
            color: var(--text-secondary) !important;
        }
        .leaflet-control-attribution a { color: var(--accent) !important; }

        /* Custom popup */
        .leaflet-popup-content-wrapper {
            background: var(--bg-elevated) !important;
            color: var(--text-primary) !important;
            border: 1px solid var(--border-strong) !important;
            border-radius: 0 !important;
            box-shadow: var(--shadow-lg) !important;
            font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', sans-serif !important;
        }
        .leaflet-popup-content {
            margin: 12px 14px !important;
            font-size: 12px !important;
            line-height: 1.55 !important;
        }
        .leaflet-popup-content strong {
            font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
            font-size: 10px;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.06em;
            color: var(--text-muted);
            font-weight: 500;
        }
        .leaflet-popup-tip {
            background: var(--bg-elevated) !important;
            border: 1px solid var(--border-strong) !important;
        }
        .leaflet-popup-close-button {
            color: var(--text-muted) !important;
            font-size: 18px !important;
            padding: 8px 10px !important;
        }
        .leaflet-tooltip {
            background: var(--bg-elevated) !important;
            color: var(--text-primary) !important;
            border: 1px solid var(--border-strong) !important;
            border-radius: 0 !important;
            font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace !important;
            font-size: 10px !important;
            padding: 4px 8px !important;
            box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm) !important;
        }
        .leaflet-tooltip::before { border: none !important; }

        /* ===========================================================
           jQUERY UI AUTOCOMPLETE — fully themed
           =========================================================== */
        .ui-autocomplete {
            background: var(--bg-elevated) !important;
            border: 1px solid var(--border-strong) !important;

            <div class="side-body">

                    <!-- Segmented mode tabs -->
                    <label class="field-label" id="modeLabel">Search method</label>

                    </div>

                    <!-- Hidden field that carries the active mode -->

                    <!-- LR Number panel -->
                    <div class="mode-panel is-active" id="panel-lr_no">
                        <div class="field-group">

                            <div class="field-hint">Start typing — suggestions appear after 3 characters</div>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Lat/Lon panel -->
                    <div class="mode-panel" id="panel-latlon">
                        <div class="field-group">
                            <label class="field-label">Coordinates · WGS84</label>
                            <div class="field-row">
                                <input type="text" class="field-input" id="latitude" name="latitude" placeholder="-1.25645">
                                <input type="text" class="field-input" id="longitude" name="longitude" placeholder="36.81797">
                            </div>
                            <div class="field-hint">Latitude · Longitude (decimal degrees)</div>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <div class="mode-panel" id="panel-current">
                        <div class="field-group">
                            <label class="field-label">Use device GPS</label>

                        </button>
                        <button type="button" id="resetBtn" class="btn btn-secondary" title="Clear">
                            <i class="fa-solid fa-rotate-left" aria-hidden="true"></i>
                        </button>
                    </div>
                </form>

                    <div id="results"></div>

<!-- Theme toggle (inline so it runs early) -->
<script>
    (function() {
        const root = document.documentElement;
        const stored = localStorage.getItem('geodesic-theme');
        const initial = stored || (window.matchMedia('(prefers-color-scheme: dark)').matches ? 'dark' : 'light');
        root.setAttribute('data-theme', initial);

        const btn  = document.getElementById('themeToggle');
        const icon = document.getElementById('themeIcon');
        const setIcon = (t) => icon.className = t === 'dark' ? 'fa-solid fa-sun' : 'fa-solid fa-moon';
        setIcon(initial);

        btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
            const next = root.getAttribute('data-theme') === 'dark' ? 'light' : 'dark';
            root.setAttribute('data-theme', next);
            localStorage.setItem('geodesic-theme', next);
            setIcon(next);
        });
    })();
</script>

<!-- App logic -->
<script>
$(document).ready(function() {

    // ----- Segmented mode tabs -----
    const $segBtns   = $('.seg-btn');
    const $panels    = $('.mode-panel');
    const $queryType = $('#queryType');

    $segBtns.on('click', function() {
        const mode = $(this).data('mode');
        $segBtns.removeClass('is-active');
        $(this).addClass('is-active');
        $panels.removeClass('is-active');
        $('#panel-' + mode).addClass('is-active');
        $queryType.val(mode);
    });

    // ----- Autocomplete for LR/Parcel -----
    $("#lr_no").autocomplete({
        source: function(request, response) {
            $.ajax({
                url: "autocomplete.php",
                dataType: "json",
                data: { term: request.term },
                success: function(data) { response(data); }
            });
        },
        minLength: 3,
        select: function(event, ui) {
            $("#lr_no").val(ui.item.value);
            return false;
        }
    }).autocomplete("instance")._renderItem = function(ul, item) {
        const itemClass = item.data_source === 'nairobi' ? 'nairobi-data' : 'mombasa-data';
        return $("<li>")
            .append("<div class='" + itemClass + "'>" + item.label + "</div>")
            .appendTo(ul);
    };

    // ----- Current Location -----
    const $locStatus = $('#locationStatus');
    function setLocStatus(msg, isError) {
        $locStatus.removeClass('is-visible is-error');
        if (msg) {
            $locStatus.html(msg).addClass('is-visible');
            if (isError) $locStatus.addClass('is-error');
        }
    }

    $('#getLocation').on('click', function() {
        if (!("geolocation" in navigator)) {
            setLocStatus("Geolocation not supported by this browser.", true);
            return;
        }
        setLocStatus('<span class="spinner"></span> Fetching location…', false);
        navigator.geolocation.getCurrentPosition(function(position) {
            $('#latitude').val(position.coords.latitude);
            $('#longitude').val(position.coords.longitude);
            setLocStatus(
                'Lat <span class="coords">' + position.coords.latitude.toFixed(6) + '°</span><br>' +
                'Lon <span class="coords">' + position.coords.longitude.toFixed(6) + '°</span>',
                false
            );
        }, function(error) {
            setLocStatus("Error: " + error.message, true);
        }, { enableHighAccuracy: true, timeout: 10000 });
    });

    // ----- Reset -----
    $('#resetBtn').on('click', function() {
        $('#queryForm')[0].reset();
        $('#latitude').val('');
        $('#longitude').val('');
        $queryType.val('lr_no');
        $segBtns.removeClass('is-active');
        $('.seg-btn[data-mode="lr_no"]').addClass('is-active');
        $panels.removeClass('is-active');
        $('#panel-lr_no').addClass('is-active');
        setLocStatus('', false);
        $('#results').html('');
        $('#resultsEmpty').show();
        parcelLayer.clearLayers();
        map.setView([-1.286389, 36.817223], 13);
    });

    // ===========================================================
    // MAP
    // ===========================================================
    const map = L.map('map', { zoomControl: true }).setView([-1.286389, 36.817223], 13);

    const streetLayer = L.tileLayer('https://{s}.google.com/vt/lyrs=m&x={x}&y={y}&z={z}', {
        maxZoom: 22,
        subdomains: ['mt0','mt1','mt2','mt3'],
        attribution: '© Google'
    });
    const satelliteLayer = L.tileLayer('https://{s}.google.com/vt/lyrs=s,h&x={x}&y={y}&z={z}', {
        maxZoom: 22,
        subdomains: ['mt0','mt1','mt2','mt3'],
        attribution: '© Google'
    });

    streetLayer.addTo(map);

    L.control.layers({
        "Street":    streetLayer,
        "Satellite": satelliteLayer
    }).addTo(map);

    map.on('baselayerchange', function(e) {
        $('#baseLayerName').text(e.name);
    });

    // Dedicated layer group for parcel boundaries (clean removal between searches)
    const parcelLayer = L.featureGroup().addTo(map);

    // ===========================================================
    // SEARCH
    // ===========================================================
    function colorFor(source) {
        const styles = getComputedStyle(document.documentElement);
        return source === 'mombasa'
            ? styles.getPropertyValue('--src-mombasa').trim()
            : styles.getPropertyValue('--src-nairobi').trim();
    }

    function renderResults(response) {
        const $results = $('#results');
        const $empty   = $('#resultsEmpty');

        // Pull data_source from geojson if present, else from html
        const source = response.geojson && response.geojson.properties && response.geojson.properties.data_source
            ? response.geojson.properties.data_source : 'nairobi';

        const pill = '<span class="src-pill ' + source + '">' + source + '</span>';
        const head =
            '<div class="results-head">' +
                '<div class="label">Parcel Details</div>' +
                pill +
            '</div>';

        $empty.hide();
        $results.html(head + (response.table || ''));
    }

    $('#queryForm').on('submit', function(e) {
        e.preventDefault();

        const $btn = $('#submitBtn');
        $btn.prop('disabled', true);

        let formData = $(this).serialize();
        if ($queryType.val() === 'current') {
            formData += '&latitude=' + $('#latitude').val() + '&longitude=' + $('#longitude').val();
        }

        $('#resultsEmpty').hide();
        $('#results').html('<div class="results-loading"><span class="spinner"></span>Searching…</div>');

        $.ajax({
            url: 'query.php',
            type: 'POST',
            data: formData,
            dataType: 'json',
            success: function(response) {
                renderResults(response);

                parcelLayer.clearLayers();

                if (response.geojson) {
                    const source = response.geojson.properties && response.geojson.properties.data_source
                        ? response.geojson.properties.data_source : 'nairobi';
                    const c = colorFor(source);

                    const parcelStyle = {
                        color: c,
                        weight: 2.5,
                        opacity: 0.9,
                        fillColor: c,
                        fillOpacity: 0.12
                    };

                    L.geoJSON(response.geojson, {
                        style: parcelStyle,
                        onEachFeature: function(feature, layer) {
                            if (!feature.properties) return;
                            const p = feature.properties;
                            let popupContent = "";
                            let tipContent   = "";

                            if (p.data_source === 'nairobi') {
                                popupContent =
                                    "<strong>Parcel Number</strong><br>" + (p.parcel_num || '') +
                                    "<br><strong>Old LR No</strong><br>" + (p.lr_number || '') +
                                    "<br><strong>FR Number</strong><br>" + (p.fr_number || '') +
                                    "<br><strong>Hectares</strong><br>" + (p.stated_are || '') +
                                    "<br><strong>Acres</strong><br>" + (p.acres || '') +
                                    "<br><strong>Block</strong><br>" + (p.block_name || '') +
                                    "<br><strong>Sub County</strong><br>" + (p.sub_county || '');
                                tipContent = p.parcel_num || 'Parcel';
                            } else {
                                popupContent =
                                    "<strong>Plot No</strong><br>" + (p.plotno || '') +
                                    "<br><strong>Source</strong><br>" + (p.source || '') +
                                    "<br><strong>Section</strong><br>" + (p.section || '') +
                                    "<br><strong>Locality</strong><br>" + (p.locality || '') +
                                    "<br><strong>Hectares</strong><br>" + (p.area_ha || '') +
                                    "<br><strong>Acres</strong><br>" + (p.acres || '');
                                tipContent = p.plotno || 'Plot';
                            }

                            layer.bindPopup(popupContent, { className: 'custom-popup', maxWidth: 280 });
                            layer.bindTooltip(tipContent, { permanent: true, direction: "center" });
                        }
                    }).addTo(parcelLayer);

                    if (parcelLayer.getLayers().length) {
                        map.fitBounds(parcelLayer.getBounds(), { padding: [40, 40], maxZoom: 19 });
                    }
                }
            },
            error: function() {
                $('#results').html('<p>An error occurred. Please try again, or refine your search.</p>');
            },
            complete: function() {
                $btn.prop('disabled', false);
            }
        });
    });

    // Ensure map sizes correctly after layout settles
    setTimeout(() => map.invalidateSize(), 100);
});
</script>
